text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My water bottle, perfectly frozen at an angle! An
icy-cool patch for my forehead! Salty candies to
keep me hydrated!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Got my checklist, got my coin pouch... Can't
forget my participant badge either! Everything
else looks... perfect!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So long as my new issues shipped in no problem,
I'm all good to go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oof! I don't wanna miss the new issue my neighbor
put out either. We're into the same genre, after
all...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Shgaafklf?! Th-this is... so amazing! The cover
alone is a flooded spectacle of maximum divinity!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Fasdfjiwi! Take my money! Please, let me buy this!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! This seller's art seems very familiar.
Particularly the way they draw the ears...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ack?! No, y-you can't be serious!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: It's Umakko Pyonkichi, the artist who did work on that crazy popular cartoon back in the day, Horsegirl ★ Dreamworld Berserker !

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whooooa! They've stayed alive long enough to
grace us with their presence today! I've always
wanted to see their own original work!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... S-summer this year is really heating up! I love these conventions!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I should offer something as a gift... Since
we're right in the middle of summer, maybe...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Preferably something that doesn't spoil. Oh, and
another essential—something that helps you keep
cool.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Staying hydrated and retaining sodium are both
important, but drinking too much water can
potentially be dangerous.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes. Besides, all the artists surely have
prepared their own beverages ahead of time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, a letter would probably be the best idea! I
was so happy when a fan wrote one for me!
Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see. It would appear her increased verbosity
stems from this summer activity. Hmm, very
interesting!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Digital, please tell me more about this
summer event!
